title: Claude Fable 5 Just Changed Website Design Forever
summary: Jack Roberts reviews Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 model, comparing it against Opus 4.8 in website design tasks across three difficulty levels. The video claims Fable 5 represents a significant advancement in AI-assisted web design, with emphasis on token efficiency and design quality in practical workflows.
writeup: Jack Roberts reviews Anthropic's Claude Fable 5, testing it against Opus 4.8 on website design tasks split into three difficulty levels. The comparison centers on token efficiency and design quality within practical web design workflows. The video argues that Fable 5 marks a meaningful step forward for AI-assisted web design, with code generation and prompt handling as the basis for the head-to-head evaluation.
